claims.text: $30K MRR and growing 40% month over month

evidence.snippet: AgentStack — Docs, GitHub, Discord. No pricing or billing page present; no paid tier advertised.
agentstack — created 21 days ago. 40 stars, 3 forks, 2 contributors.

trust.note: The claim of $30K MRR and 40% growth is contradicted by the lack of a pricing or billing page on the website (evidence 0) and the very recent creation of the GitHub repository with minimal activity (evidence 1). This suggests the traction claimed is implausible.
The evidence provided does not address the claim about the team composition of 4 ex-FAANG infrastructure engineers. The evidence is unrelated to the claim.
None of the evidence items provide information about the number of companies using the product in production.

evidence.snippet: agentstack — created 21 days ago. 40 stars, 3 forks, 2 contributors.
AgentStack — Docs, GitHub, Discord. No pricing or billing page present; no paid tier advertised.

trust.note: The GitHub repository is very new with minimal activity, and the website lacks any indication of a paid tier or billing, making the claim of 2,000 paying developers implausible.
